architecture_decisions.decision: Keep existing fetch API instead of adding axios
architecture_decisions.rationale: Codebase already uses native fetch API. Adding axios would increase bundle size unnecessarily. Native fetch is sufficient for API calls.

architecture_decisions.decision: Direct service proxying via Vite config instead of API gateway
architecture_decisions.rationale: Vite proxy configuration already handles routing to individual microservices (8001-8005). Adding an API gateway layer would add complexity without significant benefit for the current scope.

architecture_decisions.decision: Implement JWT storage in httpOnly cookies for production
architecture_decisions.rationale: More secure than localStorage. Prevents XSS attacks. Requires backend cookie configuration.

architecture_decisions.decision: Add Print Quota & Cost Management as priority feature
architecture_decisions.rationale: Market analysis shows this is a core feature across competitors (PaperCut, uniFLOW). Critical for enterprise adoption.
High-market-demand feature for security compliance. Competitors like PaperCut have this as a key differentiator.
Analytics and reporting are top priorities for print management. PaperCut's success is partly due to strong reporting.
Security feature requested in market analysis. Helps with document tracking and leak prevention.

backend_tasks.purpose: Add print quota management endpoints - check quota, deduct quota, quota history
Secure print release endpoints - hold jobs, release with authentication
Advanced reporting endpoints - usage, cost, environmental metrics
Add httpOnly cookie support for JWT storage
Update CORS middleware to support credentials mode for cookies
Mobile app support endpoints - device pairing, push notifications
Optional API Gateway for unified API entry point and rate limiting
Developer portal endpoints - API keys, documentation, usage stats

frontend_tasks.purpose: Authentication component using httpOnly cookies instead of localStorage
Add lazy loading with React.lazy for code splitting
Print quota management UI - view quota, set limits, view history
Secure print release UI - held jobs list, release action
Advanced reporting dashboard with charts and export options
Add credentials: 'include' to fetch options for cookie support
Add routes for new pages (Quota, Cost, SecureRelease, Reports, Watermark)
TypeScript types for reports and analytics
Reusable chart components for reports (using Recharts or similar)
Custom hook for quota management API calls
Custom hook for reports API calls
Update proxy configuration for new endpoints

database_migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE quotas (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id), quota_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pages', limit_amount INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, current_amount INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, period_type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'monthly', reset_date TIMESTAMP, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()); CREATE INDEX idx_quotas_user_id ON quotas(user_id);

CREATE TABLE quota_transactions (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, quota_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES quotas(id), job_id INTEGER REFERENCES jobs(id), amount INTEGER NOT NULL, transaction_type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, balance_after INTEGER NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()); CREATE INDEX idx_quota_transactions_quota_id ON quota_transactions(quota_id);

CREATE TABLE costs (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, job_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES jobs(id), user_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id), cost_per_page NUMERIC(10,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0000, total_pages INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, total_cost NUMERIC(10,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0000, currency VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD', allocated_to VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()); CREATE INDEX idx_costs_user_id ON costs(user_id); CREATE INDEX idx_costs_job_id ON costs(job_id);

CREATE TABLE held_jobs (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, job_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES jobs(id), user_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id), release_code VARCHAR(255), device_id INTEGER REFERENCES devices(id), status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'held', held_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(), expires_at TIMESTAMP, released_at TIMESTAMP, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()); CREATE INDEX idx_held_jobs_user_id ON held_jobs(user_id); CREATE INDEX idx_held_jobs_status ON held_jobs(status);

CREATE TABLE watermark_templates (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, text_content TEXT, position_x INTEGER DEFAULT 50, position_y INTEGER DEFAULT 50, font_size INTEGER DEFAULT 12, opacity NUMERIC(3,2) DEFAULT 0.5, rotation INTEGER DEFAULT 0, user_id INTEGER REFERENCES users(id), is_default BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()); CREATE INDEX idx_watermark_templates_user_id ON watermark_templates(user_id);

CREATE TABLE report_schedules (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id), report_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, schedule_type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, recipients TEXT[], parameters JSONB, last_run_at TIMESTAMP, next_run_at TIMESTAMP, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()); CREATE INDEX idx_report_schedules_user_id ON report_schedules(user_id);

CREATE TABLE mobile_devices (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id), device_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, device_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, push_token VARCHAR(500), platform VARCHAR(50), app_version VARCHAR(50), is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE, last_seen_at TIMESTAMP, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()); CREATE INDEX idx_mobile_devices_user_id ON mobile_devices(user_id);

CREATE TABLE api_keys (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id), key_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, scopes TEXT[], is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE, last_used_at TIMESTAMP, expires_at TIMESTAMP, rate_limit INTEGER DEFAULT 1000, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()); CREATE INDEX idx_api_keys_user_id ON api_keys(user_id); CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_api_keys_key_hash ON api_keys(key_hash);
ALTER TABLE jobs ADD COLUMN trees_saved NUMERIC(10,4) DEFAULT 0.0000; ALTER TABLE jobs ADD COLUMN co2_saved NUMERIC(10,4) DEFAULT 0.0000; ALTER TABLE jobs ADD COLUMN is_duplex BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE;

security_notes: JWT should be stored in httpOnly Secure cookies, not localStorage
All API endpoints must validate CSRF tokens when using cookie authentication
Release codes for secure print should be hashed before storage (bcrypt)
API keys must be hashed using SHA-256 before database storage
Rate limiting should be applied to API key endpoints
Watermark templates should be validated for XSS (no script injection in text)
Document access control: verify user owns document before applying watermark
Push notification tokens must be encrypted at rest
Cost data may be sensitive - apply role-based access control
Audit logging for all quota modifications and releases
docker_changes: Add COOKIES_SECRET environment variable for cookie signing
Add RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED environment variable for API gateway
Update auth-service Dockerfile to include cookie dependencies
Add new service container for api-gateway (optional)
Update health check endpoints to include new services
Add volume mount for report templates if using server-side PDF generation
market_driven_features: Print Quota & Cost Management - Core enterprise feature from PaperCut/uniFLOW analysis
Secure Print Release - Security differentiator, high market demand
Advanced Reporting - Analytics dashboard with environmental metrics (trees saved, CO2)
Document Watermarking - Security feature for document tracking
API Gateway + Developer Portal - For third-party integrations and extensibility
Mobile Device Support - Foundation for BYOD mobility print (mobile app API endpoints)
Cost Allocation - Department/billing code cost distribution
